---
title: "Creating A List"
---

You can configure lists and assign them to a field. A field with a list assigned appears as a drop-down list in the Scan and Import and Verifier intefaces.

To create a list:

1.  From the Hyland Experience Capture Administration user interface, click the Lists tab.
2.  Click + Create New List or Create New List. The Create new list screen is displayed.   Note: Create New List appears only when no lists have been created previously.    ![](data:image/gif;base64,)
3.  Enter a Display Name for the list.
4.  Enter a Description of the list.
5.  Select the data type of the list from the Data Type drop-down list. By default, the Alphanumeric data type is selected.
6.  In the Add List Items box, enter the items that you want to include in this list. You can add maximum of 100 items and each list item can be of a maximum of 50 characters.
- To filter the list items displayed, in the Search field, enter a string of characters contained in the name of the list you want to select.
- To change how the list items are organized, select the appropriate option from the Sort By drop-down list.The list items appear in the list in the same order in which they were added.
Note: The value format of the list items must match the specified data type of the list.
7.  Click Save.
